revision.comment: Nihiltres moved page [[Template:See also2]] to [[Template:See also-text]]: Clearer name; see [[Wikipedia talk:Hatnote#Template renaming for clarity]]. Wasn't mentioned in that plan, but falls under the same rationale, so…
1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Hatnote|{{{altphrase|See also}}}: {{#if:{{{1|}}} |{{{1}}}|'''Error: [[Template:See also2|Template must be given at least one article name]]'''{{yesno-yes|{{{category}}}|yes=[[Category:Hatnote templates with errors]]}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} {{{2}}} }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} {{{3}}} }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} {{{4}}} }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} {{{5}}} }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} {{{6}}} }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} {{{7}}} }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} {{{8}}} }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} {{{9}}} }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} {{{10}}} }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} {{{11}}} }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} {{{12}}} }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} {{{13}}} }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} {{{14}}} }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and {{{15}}} }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}| — '''
Error: [[Template:See also2|Too many links specified (maximum is 15)]]'''{{yesno-yes|{{{category}}}|yes=[[Category:Hatnote templates with errors]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] }} }}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:See also-text]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace {{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:See also-text]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages tagged as Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]][[Category:qq]] <!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q13107775)
revision.text: #[[en:Template:See also-text]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <!--ing existing page--> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q13107775}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: #[[en:Template:See also-text]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <!--ing existing page--> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q13107775}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: #[[en:Template:See also-text]] <noinclude></noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <!--ing existing page--> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q13107775}}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text: #[[en:Template:See also-text]] <noinclude></noinclude><noinclude> <noinclude></noinclude> </noinclude> <!--ing existing page--> <noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q13107775}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
